title: tontelea lanceolata
intro: Tontelea lanceolata, also known as the Lance-leaved Tontelea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its leaves and roots possessing medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tontelea lanceolata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antispasmodic and anti-arthritic agent. Tontelea lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to make ointments and salves.
